variants.title: FA51110W
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SH 66123 Spin-On Filter | Replaces the Fairey Arlon FA51110W
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SH 66123 Hydraulic Filter. Engineered to protect and optimize the performance of hydraulic systems, this filter delivers exceptional contamination control. Premium filter media captures fine particles and debris that could compromise system integrity, helping to extend the lifespan of critical hydraulic components. By maintaining fluid cleanliness, it reduces wear and tear while supporting consistent pressure levels throughout the system. Perfect for a wide range of hydraulic applications—from industrial machinery to heavy-duty equipment—this filter provides reliable performance even under high-pressure conditions. Its robust construction ensures long-lasting durability, helping to minimize downtime and maintenance costs while maximizing operational efficiency.
specifications: Style: HYDRAULIC FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 128.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 124.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 120.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): 1"1/2-16UNF, Height 1 (H1): 271.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 23.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 7.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 12µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 128.0 mm, Length: 266.0 mm, Media Type: Cellulose + Water Removal, Thread: 1 1/2"-16 UN, Collapse Pressure: 14 BAR, Seal: Nitrile, Temperature Range: +5 - +100°C

variants.title: FA51110W
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P561183 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On | Replaces the Fairey Arlon FA51110W
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P561183 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On provides dependable protection for hydraulic systems by efficiently removing particulates and contaminants. It ensures clean hydraulic fluid, promoting smooth operation and extending the lifespan of critical system components. With its easy-to-install spin-on design, this filter minimizes downtime and maintenance costs. Its durable construction and advanced filtration media make it a trusted choice for industrial and mobile hydraulic applications requiring reliable performance.

The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β200, Media Type: Cellulose + Water Removal, Collapse Pressure: 14 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: FA51110W
variants.option1Value: Filtrec A152CW10 Spin-On Filter | Replaces the Fairey Arlon FA51110W
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec A152CW10. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the A152CW10 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
